prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-14INCHSIFTCLASSKIT-14PC-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 14pc Portable Gold Panning Kit with DEEP Stackable 1/4 Inch Classifier Screen Gold Prospecting Equipment Description: A portable and comprehensive set of gold prospecting equipment, suitable for all skill levels, that allows for classification, panning, extraction and storage of any found gold. This ASR Outdoor 14pc kit includes a deep dish 5 gallon bucket stackable 1/4 inch classifier screen with handles, (3) dual riffle gold pans, (2) pipettes, (3) collection vials, (2) snifter bottles, magnifying tweezers, mini funnel and ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack.

The newest addition to ASR Outdoors classifier collection included in this kit, is the large, six inch deep plastic stackable sifting screen with built in handles, ideal for sifting out medium raw material. Importantly, this heavy duty plastic sifting screen is able to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, and is also compatible with all other sizes of ASR Outdoor stainless steel mesh classifiers.

This kit also includes (1) 10, 12 and 14 inch dual riffle gold pans, ideal for panning paydirt after classification. The gold pans are UV and rust resistant, buoyant in water and feature both shallow and deep side wall riffle zones; all gold pans come in a high contrast green colorway, making it easier to spot gold flakes or nuggets when gold panning.

Lastly, this gold panning kit includes gold prospecting tools and accessories for extraction like snifter bottles, magnifying tweezers, glass storage vials, pipettes and a clear mini funnel. All these gold prospecting tools easily fit in the included ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack, keeping everything together and organized. Good luck! Search Terms: gold prospecting equipment sluice box accessories classifier screens with handles beach digging stackable sieve rock screen gold pan set Features: - 14PC GOLD PANNING KIT: Comprehensive gold panning kit includes 1/4 inch stackable plastic sifter, (3) dual riffle gold pans, (2) pipettes, (3) collection vials, magnifying tweezers, mini funnel, (2) snifter bottles and ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack - DEEP STACKABLE 1/4 CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Featuring 4 holes per square inch; 6" depth and heavy duty side handles this classifier sifting sieve is ideal to use at the beginning of the classification process when working with medium coarse materials - 3 DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: Gold panning kit comes with (3) high contrast green plastic dual riffle gold pans in 10, 12 and 14 inch diameters, ideal for gold panning classified pay dirt - COLLECTION TOOLS: Kit includes glass vials for storing gold flakes, snifter bottles and mini funnel for easily sorting your findings; kit also includes pair of magnifying tweezers with 4x magnification - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: All gold prospecting tools and accessories included are made of durable ABS plastic and metal; High quality materials are ideal for use in all types of weather; Rinse and air dry between uses === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 14pc Gold Panning Kit with Stackable Classifier

tokens.name: Gold Panning Kit with Stackable Classifier

anthropic.title_differentiation: Deep 14 Inch Classifier Screen, 3 Dual Riffle Gold Pans, Collection Tools, Drawstring Backpack

openai.title_differentiation: Deep Stackable Quarter Inch Classifier, 3 Dual Riffle Pans, Collection Vials And Snifter Bottles, Backpack
